# Trishakti Apparel

> Trishakti Apparel is an export-focused private-label knit garment (cut-and-sew) manufacturer in Gaindakot, Nepal. It makes t-shirts, polos, sweatshirts, hoodies, and jersey basics to buyers' own designs and tech packs, and offers duty-free access to the EU, UK, and Canada under Nepal's Least Developed Country (LDC) trade status.

Trishakti Apparel serves brands, importers, wholesalers, and resellers worldwide. It is the manufacturing arm of Trishakti Stores, a fashion business trading since 1991. The factory is a dedicated single-floor knit line of about 100 sewing machines with in-house Optitex CAD, and its production team is roughly 80% women. It is honest about compliance: it states what it holds today and what is still in progress, and never claims certifications it has not earned.

## Key facts (confirmed)
- Location: Gaida Chowk, Ward-6, Gaidakot Municipality, Nawalparasi (East), Gandaki Province, Nepal.
- Type: cut-and-sew (CMT / full-package) private-label knit garment manufacturer.
- Products: crew-neck t-shirts, polo shirts, sweatshirts, hoodies, long-sleeve tees, henleys, ribbed and jersey knit basics; woven shirts also available.
- Capacity: approximately 60,000–80,000 pieces per month (confirmed per program).
- MOQ: 500–1,000 pieces per style/colour (flexible per program).
- Lead time: sampling 7–14 days; bulk 30–45 days after tech-pack approval.
- Machines: ~100 sewing machines, single-floor knit line (scaled up in 2026).
- Workforce: approximately 80% women.
- Energy: made on Nepal's predominantly hydro-electric (renewable) grid.
- Design: in-house Optitex CAD for pattern making, marking, and on-site resizing.
- Fabric: sourced flexibly, primarily from China; buyer-nominated fabric welcome.
- Incoterms: EXW Gaindakot or FOB Kolkata.
- Export status: EXIM code held; Certificate of Origin supplied; EU/UK REX registration in progress via TEPC.
- Compliance: social and quality audits (Sedex/SMETA, amfori BSCI) in progress; no third-party social certifications held yet; buyer-appointed audits and open-door visits welcome.

## Duty-free / market access (why source from Nepal)
- EU: 0% import duty under Everything But Arms (EBA), vs ~12% MFN on cotton knit t-shirts.
- UK: 0% duty under the Developing Countries Trading Scheme (DCTS).
- Canada: 0% duty under the Least Developed Country Tariff (LDCT) — the most fabric-friendly rule.
- Single transformation: cutting and sewing in Nepal qualifies the garment as Nepal-made even with imported fabric.
- United States: no LDC duty-free access, but Nepal carries among the lowest tariffs in South Asia.
- Timing: Nepal graduates from LDC status in November 2026, with an EU/UK transition keeping duty-free access to roughly 2029.

- [Private-label t-shirts](https://trishaktiapparel.com.np/products/t-shirts/)

- [Sweatshirts & hoodies](https://trishaktiapparel.com.np/products/sweatshirts-hoodies/)
- [Woven shirts](https://trishaktiapparel.com.np/products/woven-shirts/)
